scripts.sync:sources: git submodule sync --recursive && git submodule update --init --recursive --remote
scripts.build:indexed-site: pnpm build:search-records && pnpm build:pagefind && pnpm check:pagefind
scripts.check:js:syntax: find site-src/assets/js script tests/functional \( -name '*.js' -o -name '*.mjs' \) -print0 | sort -z | xargs -0 -n1 node --check
scripts.test:site: ruby script/validate_catalogs.rb && pnpm build:indexed-site && pnpm check:seo
scripts.test:full: pnpm check:validate && pnpm lint:ruby && pnpm check:js && pnpm validate:catalogs && pnpm test:ruby && pnpm build:indexed-site && pnpm check:seo && pnpm check:links && pnpm test:functional:built
